section.heading: Hunting, pursuing, capturing, etc., in Ocala National Forest unlawful

content.p: When such game sanctuaries or refuges have been established as provided in section 692 of this title, the hunting, pursuing, poisoning, killing, or capturing by trapping, netting, or any other means, or attempting to hunt, pursue, kill, or capture any game animals or birds upon the lands of the United States within the limits of such game sanctuaries or refuges shall be unlawful except under such rules and regulations as the Secretary of Agriculture may from time to time prescribe.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1948—Act June 25, 1948, struck out penal provisions (see section 41 of Title 18, Crimes and Criminal Procedure), and inserted reference to rules and regulations of the Secretary of Agriculture.

note.heading: Effective Date of 1948 Amendment
note.p: Section 20 of act June 25, 1948, provided that the amendment made by that act is effective Sept. 1, 1948.
